---
title: "Los Angeles, California"
year: 2026
image: /images/los_angeles_CA.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Los Angeles, California"
categories: ["Rate Setting", "Service Procurement"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# 2025-2026 City of Los Angeles Commercial Collection Franchise Procurement (recycLA)
The Los Angeles Department of Sanitation is completing the second iteration of
procuring service providers for its commercial collection franchise, known as
recycLA. The focus of the updated program is to comply with California law
SB-1383 by providing the city’s 66,000 commercial customers with organic
collection and increasing the effort to increase material diversion. Additional
considerations include an electric collection fleet and reduced access and
distance fees. Mr. Bell is assisting with the analysis of the proposed rates
and fees, rate modeling, and negotiations with potential recycLA service
providers.

# 2013-2016 City of Los Angeles Commercial Collection Franchise Procurement and Implementation

The Los Angeles Department of Sanitation is completing the second iteration of
procuring service providers for its commercial collection franchise, known as
recycLA. The focus of the updated program is to comply with California law
SB-1383 by providing the city’s 66,000 commercial customers with organic
collection and increasing the effort to increase material diversion. Additional
considerations include an electric collection fleet and reduced access and
distance fees. Mr. Bell is assisting with the analysis of the proposed rates
and fees, rate modeling, and negotiations with potential recycLA service
providers.

[Thumbnail Image by Alek Leckszas - Own work, CC BY-SA 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=76431252)
:::
